summary: Replace runtime LLM finalization with deterministic finalization artifacts.
rationale: This slice removes the LLM finalizer from the core runtime completion path while preserving deterministic final candidates, runtime reports, diagnostics, CLI, and TUI consumers. Conversation-facing natural language stays outside the workflow runtime; the runtime now publishes stable machine-readable finalization facts.
verification: uv run pytest tests/test_finalizer_contract.py tests/test_runtime_state_flow.py tests/test_runtime_audit.py tests/test_runtime_control_final_summary.py -q
uv run ty check src tests tools
uv run pytest tests/test_liepin_worker_client.py tests/test_liepin_opencli_worker_client.py tests/test_liepin_cli.py tests/test_liepin_boundaries.py -q
deletion_targets: finalizer provider configuration as a required runtime completion dependency
final report consumers depending on a generated finalizer narrative
risks: Existing debug adapters keep a compatibility finalizer facade, but the runtime completion contract should read deterministic finalization artifacts.
The Conversation Agent is responsible for user-facing narrative after reading deterministic runtime facts.
